name: easy-auto
description: SessionStart + UserPromptSubmit + PreCompact + PostCompact hook — auto-injects the `easy` (friendly) response style as additionalContext so the 7-element pattern (icon · name · alias · plain-line · analogy · ASCII · compare) is active from turn 0 without the user having to call `/easy` first. Reads `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/styles/easy.<lang>.md` per the user's response language (env `EASY_LANG` override, default `ko`); falls back to `easy.md` (English base) when the lang variant is missing. Implemented in hexa-lang (`_easy_auto.hexa`, invoked via `hexa run`). UserPromptSubmit re-injects every turn so the style never fades; PreCompact + PostCompact preserve it across auto-compaction. Pairs with the `easy` skill (manual `/easy` trigger remains available — easy-auto is the default-on layer). NO opt-out by design (commons @D g30) — disable via `EASY_LANG=off` env if truly needed.
